slides.title: AI Workbench Local — Policy / Contract Comparison
slides.subtitle: Executive comparison review of grounded document differences
slides.speaker_notes: Export kind: policy_contract_comparison_deck. Deck family: comparison. Sources: structured_result, document_agent_comparison.

slides.title: Executive summary
slides.body:
Executive Comparison:
Document v3.2 builds upon v3.1 by expanding security measures, particularly in workforce account authentication and vendor oversight.

- Mandatory MFA for all accounts in v3.2 vs. only privileged access in v3.1.
- Quarterly reviews of privileged access in v3.2 vs. annual reviews in v3.1.
- More rigorous vendor oversight introduced in v3.2.
- Stricter incident response protocols added in v3.2.
- Both versions emphasize multi-factor authentication and regular review cycles.
- Enhanced security controls across the entire organization in v3.2.
